3145230.name: Blastback
3145230.description:
Blastback is a fast-paced 2D retro-style roguelike where the player must face hordes of enemies by using a blessed, pneumatic-powered bat.

Features:

Fluid gameplay and combat based on deflections and ricochets.

Procedurally generated levels, mixed with hand-crafted room designs to provide a diverse exploration based on the choices you make.

Upgrade systems to take your weapon to the next level, with different mutations to discover.

Many Amulets to activate additional combat effects.

A secret buried in the depths of the temple, waiting to be unveiled.
3145230.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
